ideation: This sequence mimics the action of carefully holding and presenting a falafel ball.  The animation emphasizes gentle movements and a focus on the food item. The left arm will cradle the falafel while the right arm supports it from below.  The movements should be slow and deliberate to convey care and attention. In frame 1, both arms start in a relaxed position at the side. In frame 2, the left arm moves upward, slightly outward, and curves forward to cradle the falafel. The right arm moves upward and slightly inward, positioning itself underneath to support the falafel. In frame 3, the left arm slightly adjusts its position to better support the falafel. In frame 4, the arms maintain their positions but with a subtle shift, further emphasizing the careful handling of the food. In frame 5, the arms return to a relaxed position, implying that the falafel has been successfully presented or enjoyed.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to serve
left arm gently lifts to cradle, right supports from below
both arms carefully hold the falafel ball
slight adjustment, ensuring a secure hold
arms return to rest, falafel presented
